# 8D Report

> [!TIP]
> Work through each D in sequence — skipping ahead weakens the analysis.
> Use `Ctrl+;` to stamp dates and `Ctrl+K` to link related documents.

---

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Report No.** | 8D-[YYYYMMDD]-[SEQ] |
| **Date** | [YYYY-MM-DD] |
| **Customer / Project** | [Name] |
| **Owner** | [Name] |
| **Product / Model** | [Model number] |
| **Issue Summary** | [One-line description] |

---

## D1 — Team Formation

| Role | Name | Department | Responsibility |
|------|------|------------|----------------|
| Leader | | | |
| Technical | | | |
| Quality | | | |
| Customer Contact | | | |

---

## D2 — Problem Description (Is / Is Not)

| Dimension | IS (Observed) | IS NOT (Excluded) |
|-----------|---------------|-------------------|
| **What** — which part / function | | |
| **Where** — location / process / unit | | |
| **When** — timing / since when | | |
| **Who** — which operator / model | | |
| **How Much** — frequency / scale | | |

**Problem statement (1–2 sentences):**
> [Concise description of the problem]

> [!TIP]
> Use the **Is / Is Not Analysis** template for a deeper boundary analysis.

---

## D3 — Interim Containment

- [ ] Action taken:
- [ ] Date implemented:
- [ ] Implemented by:
- [ ] Verification method:

---

## D4 — Root Cause Identification

### Why-Why Analysis

```
Symptom: [Describe the failure]
  └─ Why 1:
      └─ Why 2:
          └─ Why 3:
              └─ Why 4:
                  └─ Why 5 (Root Cause):
```

### Root Cause Summary

| # | Root Cause | Evidence | Confidence |
|---|-----------|----------|------------|
| 1 | | | High / Medium / Low |
| 2 | | | High / Medium / Low |

> [!TIP]
> Use the **Five Whys Analysis** template for a structured drill-down.

---

## D5 — Permanent Corrective Action Selection

| Option | Effectiveness | Feasibility | Selected |
|--------|--------------|-------------|----------|
| Option A | | | Yes / No |
| Option B | | | Yes / No |

**Selected approach:**
> [Which option and why]

---

## D6 — Implementation & Verification

| Action | Owner | Due Date | Status |
|--------|-------|----------|--------|
| | | | [ ] Not started |
| | | | [ ] Not started |

**Verification method:**
> [How effectiveness will be measured]

---

## D7 — Prevent Recurrence / Horizontal Deployment

- **Horizontal deployment to similar products / processes:**
  - [ ] [Model / Process A]
  - [ ] [Model / Process B]
- **Document / procedure revisions:**
  - [ ] [Document Name] Rev.[X] → Rev.[Y]
- **Training:**
  - [ ] Target: [Team / individuals]

---

## D8 — Close & Recognize the Team

- Close date: [YYYY-MM-DD]
- Approved by: [Name]
- Knowledge base updated: [ ]

**Team recognition:**
> [Acknowledge contributions]
